## Context
A link to the Slack channel or Incident report.

## What's involved

- [ ] Assess severity
- [ ] Categorize impact
- [ ] Identify issue
- [ ] Immediate fix
- [ ] Stakeholder communication
- [ ] Longer-term mitigation
- [ ] Complete the report
- [ ] Retrospective
- [ ] Relevant action items in board
